description: CSP is currently Report-Only with `unsafe-inline` allowed. Audit every inline `<script>` in `app/templates/`, move to external files or use nonce-based CSP, then switch from Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only to enforced CSP and drop unsafe-inline. Verify no console violations on /, /dashboard, /map, /tools/fitting, /skill-plans, /industry, /admin.
title: Remove CSP unsafe-inline (VVP-2026-007)
